overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Mortgage Backed Bond ETF (SPMB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of US agency mortgage pass-through debt. SPMB was launched on Jan 15, 2009 and is issued by State Street.
